title: cephalophorus columna-trajani
intro: Cephalophorus columna-trajani, also known as the Trajan's Column Fennel, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cephalophorus columna-trajani include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water to make teas or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
